left_assoc✝ : R.mul ▷ X✝ ≫ actLeft✝ = (α_ R.X R.X X✝).hom ≫ R.X ◁ actLeft✝ ≫ actLeft✝

right_assoc✝ : X✝ ◁ S.mul ≫ actRight✝ = (α_ X✝ S.X S.X).inv ≫ actRight✝ ▷ S.X ≫ actRight✝

⊢ R.mul ▷
        X

          Q ≫

              actRight := actRight✝, actRight_one := actRight_one✝, right_assoc := right_assoc✝,
              middle_assoc := middle_assoc✝ }
            Q)).hom ≫

              actRight := actRight✝, actRight_one := actRight_one✝, right_assoc := right_assoc✝,
              middle_assoc := middle_assoc✝ }
            Q ≫
        actLeft
          { X := X✝, actLeft := actLeft✝, one_actLeft := one_actLeft✝, left_assoc := left_assoc✝, actRight := actRight✝,
